name: Fasting-mimicking diet
summary: Short-cycle dietary program tracked for autophagy-pathway and metabolic biomarker movement in small human studies.
mechanism_summary: Uses periodic low-calorie, low-protein dietary cycles intended to engage fasting-like nutrient-sensing and autophagy programs.

open_questions: Whether short-term autophagy-marker movement persists or translates into functional aging benefit
Which formulation, protein level, and cycle schedule best maps to aging biology
